production_chain.description: Use for production-chain questions about what a structure or unit can produce, train, build, morph, spawn, or research.

tech_dependency.description: Use for technology and dependency questions about prerequisites, unlock paths, dependency chains, or the impact of a missing or destroyed structure.

combat_production_filter.description: Used for production-path + combat-filter compound queries: which units from a specified producer or tech line have specific combat attributes (anti-air, anti-ground, range, speed, etc.), optionally sorted by cost, time, or combat stats.
